heading: Examination of mines; reports
label: 680 Examination of mines; reports
text: Said commission, or a committee therefrom, or officer of said corps assigned to duty under its orders, shall, whenever deemed necessary, visit said territory and all mines operating under the provisions of this chapter. A report of such examination shall be placed on file.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsCalifornia Debris Commission abolished and functions transferred to Secretary of the Army by , , , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–662, title XI, § 1106100 Stat. 4229section 661 of this titleNov. 17, 1986
